'''Daggibus Scoritoles''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], just before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he and his people joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
